title: APM: Octo Demo Compromised VM Detection Rule
description: Scheduled-rule-safe count of compromised VM evidence correlated to Octo attack IDs.
query: 'Log Source' = 'SOC Application Logs' and 'Service Namespace' = 'octo' and 'Attack ID' != null and 'Compromised VM' != null | stats count as CompromisedVmEvents by 'Attack ID', 'Compromised VM', 'Host Role'
